name: Puluc
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Puluc (Bul, Boolik): the Maya / Q'eqchi' running-fight game of Guatemala, traditionally played the night before sowing maize. Both armies of 5 run in opposite directions along ONE shared track of corn-kernel gaps, moving by four binary corn dice (black faces up = 1-4, all plain = 5). Land exactly on an enemy to capture its whole pile: it stacks beneath you and you turn around, dragging your prisoners home — reach your end to kill them for good and re-enter. But land on a carrier and the entire pile changes hands, freeing your own captives to ride home with you. Kill all five enemy pieces to win.
